page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Rapid development of cloud-native intelligent data pipelines for scientific data streams using the HASTE Toolkit.

Client for the HASTE Storage Engine.

Smart middleware for working with a variety of storage media with Scientific Computing datasets. Supports Python 2.7 and Python 3.*.
